Title: Non-workplace learning in employer responsive funding model
Description: This code is used to describe provision that is not being delivered in the workplace but the funding model is employer responsive. This code can only be for learners who are aged 19 or over on 31 August 2011.

Title: Birmingham CLT
Description: This code should be used to identify learners who are undertaking community learning provision as part of the Community Learning Trust Pilot Scheme in Birmingham

Title: Community Learning in Cheshire (CLiC)
Description: This code should be used to identify learners who are undertaking community learning provision as part of the Community Learning Trust Pilot Scheme in Cheshire

Title: Kent Community Learning Trust
Description: This code should be used to identify learners who are undertaking community learning provision as part of the Community Learning Trust Pilot Scheme in Kent

Title: Brighton and Hove Community Learning Trust BHCLT
Description: This code should be used to identify learners who are undertaking community learning provision as part of the Community Learning Trust Pilot Scheme in Brighton and Hove

Title: Tunnelling procurement
Description: The purpose of this provision is to ensure that capacity is in place to provide skills support to tunnelling operations and underground construction to unemployed individuals on benefits and looking for work but face a skills barrier to entering this specific labour market.

Title: ESOL QCF additional learning
Description: This code should be used to identify extra ESOL learning aims (from Category B of Appendix H) required to deliver the new ESOL QCF qualifications where a learner needs additional guided learning hours over and above those expected for the qualification. The code does not apply to learners whose main learning aim is non-regulated provision.

Title: Solent Skills for Growth Programme
Description: Unit Trial for Solent Businesses with high growth potential
